name: tale-mode
description: A discipline mode for complex/high-stakes work: staged planning, decisions-with-receipts, verify-against-source, parallel delegation, adversarial review. Always-on core disciplines via a SessionStart hook, plus a self-armed autonomous loop (a deterministic Stop gate) that can also arm itself from a committed, content-hash-trusted .claude/tale-mode.json during a kickoff phase. Cross-platform: the skill + autonomous loop run on both Claude Code and OpenAI Codex (on Codex the loop needs the one-time `touch ~/.tale-mode-allow-cwd-root` opt-in — its hook subprocesses don't receive env config). Helper skills: trust (the two user-only opt-in files), seed-gates (suggest committed gates), end-phase (clear the phase marker). The optional read-only Sonnet governor ships as the companion plugin tale-mode-governor.
